title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Medical Officer Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for the Medical Officer Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS and BDS can use this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we mentioned the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Governme...
